label: Feature
description: Defines a world map feature: named geographic regions such as oceans, mountain ranges, islands, and archipelagos generated by a FeatureWorker.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# FeatureWorker subclass that implements the placement algorithm for this feature.

order.label: Order
order.description: Determines which FeatureDef claims a tile when multiple features overlap. Higher values take priority.

minSize.label: Min size
minSize.description: Minimum number of world tiles this feature must cover to be placed.

maxSize.label: Max size
maxSize.description: Maximum number of world tiles this feature may cover. Defaults to no limit.

canTouchWorldEdge.label: Can touch world edge
canTouchWorldEdge.description: When false, this feature is rejected if any of its tiles border the edge of the world map.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate a procedural name for this feature.

maxPossiblyAllowedSizeToTake.label: Max possibly allowed size to take
maxPossiblyAllowedSizeToTake.description: Upper limit on how many tiles another feature is allowed to claim from this feature's area.

maxPossiblyAllowedSizePctOfMeToTake.label: Max possibly allowed size pct of me to take
maxPossiblyAllowedSizePctOfMeToTake.description: Maximum fraction of this feature's area that another feature may claim, expressed as a value from 0 to 1.

rootBiomes.label: Root biomes
rootBiomes.description: BiomeDefs whose tiles are eligible as root tiles for seeding this feature's flood-fill or cluster.

acceptableBiomes.label: Acceptable biomes
acceptableBiomes.description: BiomeDefs whose tiles may be included in this feature's area beyond the root biomes.

maxSpaceBetweenRootGroups.label: Max space between root groups
maxSpaceBetweenRootGroups.description: Maximum tile distance allowed between separate root groups in a cluster-based feature.

minRootGroupsInCluster.label: Min root groups in cluster
minRootGroupsInCluster.description: Minimum number of root tile groups required to form a valid cluster feature.

minRootGroupSize.label: Min root group size
minRootGroupSize.description: Minimum number of contiguous root tiles required to count as a valid root group.

maxRootGroupSize.label: Max root group size
maxRootGroupSize.description: Maximum number of contiguous root tiles that form a single root group. Defaults to no limit.

maxPassageWidth.label: Max passage width
maxPassageWidth.description: Maximum tile width of a land passage that the flood-fill algorithm is allowed to cross when connecting water bodies.

maxPctOfWholeArea.label: Max pct of whole area
maxPctOfWholeArea.description: Maximum fraction of the total world tile count this feature may cover, expressed as a value from 0 to 1.

basic-feature.label: Basic feature
basic-feature.description: Minimal feature with a worker class, order, and name maker.
